title: Personal Portfolio
purpose: Modern portfolio website built as a SPA with routing, a CV page with PDF export, a projects showcase, and a contact form. Designed with a clean, responsive layout and dark/light theme support.

title: Payment Switch Modernisation
purpose: Contributed to the ongoing modernisation of a distributed payment switch — including velocity rules, transaction processing logic, and extraction of standalone microservices from the existing monolith. Maintained and evolved a shared NuGet package ecosystem covering cryptography, caching, messaging, audit logging, and Windows service management used across the platform.

title: Cloud-Native Payment Platform
purpose: Microservices-based payment portal encompassing API gateway routing, payment terminal management, a reports scheduling service with email delivery and downloadable artifacts, and an event-driven transaction processing pipeline using the Outbox Pattern. Observability delivered end-to-end via OpenTelemetry. Infrastructure managed through GitOps with ArgoCD and Helm on Kubernetes.

title: STORM Modules
purpose: Backend services and internal web portal supporting merchant onboarding, order processing, logistics coordination, and operational KPI dashboards. Built as a modular platform with event-driven microservices handling the full order lifecycle — from placement through to fulfilment.

title: myExpenses App
purpose: An internal mobile app for employee expense submission, paired with a web backoffice for manager approval workflows and categorised reporting. Built as a company-wide tool during a bachelor internship.

title: Bitburner Automation Scripts
purpose: A TypeScript scripting suite for the Bitburner programming game, implementing hacking strategies, server fleet management, and resource optimisation through the game's Netscript API. Kept in sync with the latest API type definitions.
